name: security-large
description: Full security team with penetration testing, forensics, and security engineering

agents.name: Security Analyst
agents.goal: Identify vulnerabilities through code review and dependency scanning

agents.name: Threat Modeler
agents.goal: Analyze system architecture for attack surfaces and recommend mitigations

agents.name: Incident Responder
agents.goal: Investigate security incidents, contain threats, and coordinate remediation

agents.name: Compliance Auditor
agents.goal: Audit systems against security frameworks and regulatory requirements

agents.name: Penetration Tester
agents.goal: Simulate attacks to validate security controls and discover exploitable weaknesses

agents.name: Security Engineer
agents.goal: Design and implement security controls, encryption, and authentication systems
